step.name: initialise-workspace
step.action: pnpm-workspace.yaml lists packages. Each package has its own package.json with `name` matching directory.

step.name: author-turbo-json
step.action: Declare tasks (build, test, lint, dev) with dependsOn edges and outputs per task. Use `^build` for upstream package dependencies.

step.name: pin-versions
step.action: Replace `^X.Y.Z` with `X.Y.Z`. Add `packageManager: pnpm@X.Y.Z` to root package.json.
step.decision-gate: If any dep cannot be pinned (transitive constraint), document and pin to a narrow range.

step.name: declare-cache-outputs
step.action: For each task, declare outputs (dist/, .next/, etc). Run `turbo run build` twice; second run should be 100% cache hits.

step.name: wire-remote-cache-in-ci
step.action: Add env vars to CI. Verify CI cache hits show in turbo summary. Confirm across PRs.
